# Cam Taylor — Sherpa
> Personal site for deal architecture, capital syndication, and venture operations.

Last updated: 2026-07-15

## Identity
- Name: Cam Taylor (Cameron Taylor)
- Title: Sherpa
- Tagline: We get people to the top — and back down again.
- Location: British Columbia, Canada (Pacific Time)
- Email: cam@camtaylor.ca
- NOSTR NIP-05: cam@giveabit.io
- URL: https://camtaylor.ca
- Social: GitHub, X, Nostr only (no LinkedIn)

## Expertise
- Deal Architecture
- Capital Syndication
- Venture Operations
- Special Situations

## Expedition Tiers
- Day Hike (<$100K) — quick advisory
- Multi-day ($100K–$1M) — structured engagement
- Expedition ($1M–$5M) — full deal architecture
- Rescue Mission ($5M+) — special situations

## Active Ventures
- Satohash (Crypto Infrastructure) — https://satohash.io
- Katoa (Engineering) — https://katoa.org
- GiveABit (Social Yield) — https://giveabit.io
- OpenStrata (PropTech) — https://openstrata.giveabit.io
- Motopass (AutoTech) — https://motopass.giveabit.io
- Sherpacarta (MapTech) — https://sherpacarta.org
- Tadbuy (E-Commerce) — https://tadbuy.giveabit.io

## Command Deck
Available on homepage. Commands: /help, /about, /status, /services, /ventures, /route, /manifesto, /contact, /book, /nostr, /field-guide, /2026

## Contact
Use the contact form at https://camtaylor.ca/#contact or email cam@camtaylor.ca.
Response time: typically within 48h PT.

## Pages
- / — Homepage with hero, ventures, contact
- /field-guide — Sherpa Field Guide (printable)
- /2026 — State of the Route annual review
- /route/:ventureId — Venture deep-dive pages
- /privacy — Privacy Policy
- /terms — Terms of Use

## Deploy
Local-first. Planned host: Cloudflare Pages. Not deployed yet.

Part of the Give A Bit family — https://giveabit.io
